_meta.title: Neutral job / timing model — normalized units and progress
_meta.scope: cross-vendor (neutral target, not a wire format)
_meta.confidence: neutral model — a synthesis, not a wire fact; the per-vendor timing facts carry the confidence

derived_from.source_note: Synthesis of ../../patterns/timing-normalization.md. Per-vendor field names and progress kind live in each protocols/<vendor>.md.

notes: Convert every time value to integer seconds AT THE ADAPTER EDGE; nothing downstream re-multiplies by 60 or 3600.
A naive elapsed/progress ETA is systematically wrong near the end for the file-byte progress kind.

time.note: vendors send minutes / seconds / milliseconds — convert once at the edge

filament.note: derive from remaining_pct x slot weight where only a % is exposed

progress_kind.note: REQUIRED to compute a correct ETA. time-based: Anycubic, Bambu, PrusaLink, Elegoo SDCP. file-byte: most Klipper/Moonraker-descended and object-model stacks (Klipper, Creality, Duet, OctoPrint, Snapmaker) + Marlin (M27 byte position).

remaining_time_precedence.note: when the file metadata carries a total estimate
ONLY with time-based progress; NEVER with file-byte progress
